title: corylus ferox
intro: Corylus ferox, also known as the sharp-leaved hazel or spiny hazel, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corylus ferox include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Corylus ferox can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and bark are also used to make herbal preparations, such as ointments and salves.
